code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about airports (or related entities) into a single,
    fluent English sentence. The function tries to render each predicate in a
    human‑readable way and joins the resulting clauses with commas and a final
    “and”.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Helper to turn a predicate + object into a readable phrase
    def phrase(pred: str, obj: str) -> str:
        mapping = {
            "cityServed": lambda o: f"serves the city of {o}",
            "location": lambda o: f"is located in {o}",
            "operatingOrganisation": lambda o: f"is operated by {o}",
            "runwayLength": lambda o: f"has a runway length of {o} metres",
            "runwayName": lambda o: f"has a runway named {o}",
            "country": lambda o: f"is in the country {o}",
            "isPartOf": lambda o: f"is part of {o}",
            "1stRunwayLengthFeet": lambda o: f"has a first runway length of {o} feet",
            "1stRunwaySurfaceType": lambda o: f"has a first runway surface type {o}",
            "3rdRunwayLengthFeet": lambda o: f"has a third runway length of {o} feet",
            "icaoLocationIdentifier": lambda o: f"has ICAO identifier {o}",
            "locationIdentifier": lambda o: f"has location identifier {o}",
            "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": lambda o: f"is at {o} feet above sea level",
            "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": lambda o: f"is at {o} metres above sea level",
            "iataLocationIdentifier": lambda o: f"has IATA code {o}",
            "nativeName": lambda o: f"is also known as {o}",
            "runwaySurfaceType": lambda o: f"has runway surface type {o}",
            "runwayLength": lambda o: f"has a runway length of {o} metres",
            "runwayName": lambda o: f"has a runway named {o}",
            "leaderParty": lambda o: f"has a leader from the {o} party",
            "capital": lambda o: f"has capital {o}",
            "language": lambda o: f"speaks {o}",
            "leader": lambda o: f"is led by {o}",
            "owner": lambda o: f"is owned by {o}",
            "largestCity": lambda o: f"contains the largest city {o}",
            "mayor": lambda o: f"is administered by Mayor {o}",
            "officialLanguage": lambda o: f"has official language {o}",
            "regionServed": lambda o: f"serves the region {o}",
            "hubAirport": lambda o: f"uses {o} as its hub airport",
            "currency": lambda o: f"uses the currency {o}",
            "headquarter": lambda o: f"has its headquarter at {o}",
            "class": lambda o: f"belongs to class {o}",
            "division": lambda o: f"is in division {o}",
            "order": lambda o: f"is ordered under {o}",
            "demonym": lambda o: f"has demonym {o}",
            "postalCode": lambda o: f"has postal code {o}",
            "areaCode": lambda o: f"has area code {o}",
            "foundingYear": lambda o: f"was founded in {o}",
            "ceremonialCounty": lambda o: f"is in ceremonial county {o}",
            # default fallback
        }
        return mapping.get(pred, lambda o: f"has {pred} {o}")(obj)

    # Build clauses for each triple
    clauses = [f"{t.subject} {phrase(t.predicate, t.object)}" for t in triples]

    # Join clauses into a single sentence
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        sentence = clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."

    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
